body.title: Announce-protocol slice 4b — Igor cortex tool dispatch via DatacenterClient manifest
body.result: Slice 4b shipped (commit dc0282ae). HIGH-inertia main.py + node_executor.py edits. Cortex.dc_client wired in main.py:_wire_datacenter; threaded through cursor_runtime → execute_node; MCPCALL consults manifest, logs INFO when manifest-bound, dispatches via local registry as before. 4 new tests pass. Bystander fix: main.py:496 Cortex sweep miss (Igor boot was broken since 9bfc31ae). Filed T-igor-boot-smoke-test (S) + T-flaky-tests-pe-entry-uc-delivery (S) follow-ons. Suite: 4297→4301 passing, no new regressions.
body.description:
Deferred from the announce-protocol parent (slices 1-5 shipped 2026-05-01). Slice 4b wires Igor's cortex tool dispatch through the DatacenterClient manifest so Igor's tool calls resolve via the announced capability map instead of the hardcoded tool registry import path.

**Akien decision (2026-05-01, option A):** deferred slice 4b in favor of T-igor-cognition-bypassing-advisor (now done, commit f8dd2999) so the cognition regression fix bisect stays clean. Resume slice 4b once cognition is observed stable on real ticket runs.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/main.py (cortex tool dispatch path); wild_igor/igor/tools/registry.py (route tool resolution through DatacenterClient.get_tool when manifest present); test files for the new dispatch path.

**Design rules:** docs-in-code (load-bearing path); test-plan-or-why-not.

**Scope boundary:** IN — wire Igor cortex's runtime tool resolution through the cached manifest from DatacenterClient when present; fall back to the existing hardcoded registry path when DatacenterClient is None or the manifest doesn't list the tool. OUT — broader refactor of registry semantics; changing tool-call invocation API; CC-side tool dispatch (separate ticket if needed).

**Test plan:** test_igor_cortex_dispatches_via_manifest — integration test asserts Igor.tool_call(name) resolves via DatacenterClient.get_tool when manifest names the tool; test_igor_cortex_falls_back_to_registry_when_no_manifest — verifies graceful fallback. Plus end-to-end: bounce Igor with announce wired, verify a tool fires through the manifest path (logged at INFO).

**HIGH-inertia note:** wild_igor/igor/main.py is HIGH-inertia. Per pre-approval requirement: this ticket needs Akien sign-off before sprint, even via /audit-ticket pre-approval. Run /audit-precode before first edit; surface intended edit shape inline to Akien for stamp.
